result.stderr:
CPMigrate 3.3.2+2b486a54f0729b183da44a6364b01bbd81dd3f80
Copyright (C) 2026 George Wall
USAGE:
Default behaviour:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --output-dir .
Convert only one project:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --output-dir . --project path/to/project.csproj
Specify the output directory, generates '../upDir/Directory.Packages.props':
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --output-dir ../upDir
Preview changes without modifying files:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --dry-run --output-dir .
Fail if version conflicts are detected:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --conflict-strategy Fail --output-dir .
Analyze packages for issues without migrating:
  cpmigrate --analyze --backup-dir . --output-dir .
Run in interactive wizard mode:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --interactive --output-dir .
Merge with existing Directory.Packages.props:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --merge --output-dir .
Output JSON for CI/CD integration:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --output-dir . --output Json
Batch migrate all solutions in a directory:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --batch path/to/repo --output-dir .
Analyze and auto-fix issues:
  cpmigrate --analyze --backup-dir . --fix --output-dir .
Analyze and include outdated/deprecated package checks:
  cpmigrate --analyze --backup-dir . --deprecated --output-dir . --outdated
Prune old backups, keeping last 3:
  cpmigrate --backup-dir . --output-dir . --prune-backups --retention 3

  -s, --solution             Path to a .sln/.slnx file, or a directory
                             containing one. When omitted, CPMigrate uses the
                             current directory.

  -p, --project              Path to a specific project file, or a directory
                             containing one project (.csproj, .fsproj, .vbproj).

  -o, --output-dir           (Default: .) The props file output directory.

  -k, --keep-attrs           (Default: false) Keeps the 'Version' attribute in
                             the project files.

  -n, --no-backup            (Default: false) Disables the default backup
                             option.

  --backup-dir               (Default: .) The backup directory for project files
                             about to be changed.

  --add-gitignore            (Default: false) Adds the backup directory to
                             .gitignore file. Creates one if not present.

  --gitignore-dir            (Default: .) The directory for .gitignore file if
                             there isn't one existing.

  -d, --dry-run              (Default: false) Preview changes without modifying
                             any files.

  --merge                    (Default: false) Merge into existing
                             Directory.Packages.props instead of failing if it
                             already exists.

  --conflict-strategy        (Default: Highest) How to handle version conflicts:
                             Highest (default), Lowest, or Fail.

  -r, --rollback             (Default: false) Restore project files from most
                             recent backup and remove Directory.Packages.props.

  -a, --analyze              (Default: false) Analyze packages for issues
                             (version inconsistencies, duplicates, redundant
                             references) without modifying files.

  --transitive               (Default: false) Include transitive dependencies in
                             analysis and migration suggestions (requires
                             'dotnet restore').

  --audit                    (Default: false) Perform security audit for known
                             vulnerabilities (requires 'dotnet restore').

  --outdated                 (Default: false) Include outdated package checks
                             (requires --analyze).

  --deprecated               (Default: false) Include deprecated package checks
                             (requires --analyze).

  -i, --interactive          (Default: false) Run in interactive wizard mode
                             with guided prompts.

  --output                   (Default: Terminal) Output format: Terminal
                             (default) or Json for CI/CD integration.

  --output-file              Write output to file instead of stdout (only
                             applies to JSON output).

  -q, --quiet                (Default: false) Suppress non-essential output
                             (progress bars, spinners). Useful for scripts.

  -v, --verbose              (Default: false) Enable verbose diagnostic logging
                             to a file (cpmigrate.log in current directory).

  --batch                    Scan directory recursively for .sln files and
                             process each.

  --batch-parallel           (Default: false) Process solutions in parallel
                             (default: sequential).

  --batch-continue           (Default: false) Continue processing even if one
                             solution fails.

  --prune-backups            (Default: false) Delete old backups, keeping only
                             the most recent based on --retention.

  --prune-all                (Default: false) Delete ALL backups (requires
                             confirmation unless --quiet is set).

  --retention                (Default: 5) Number of backups to keep when pruning
                             (default: 5, 0 = keep all).

  --list-backups             (Default: false) List all available backups with
                             timestamps and file counts.

  --interactive-conflicts    (Default: false) Prompt for each version conflict
                             instead of auto-resolving.

  --unify-props              (Default: false) Migrate common properties from
                             projects to Directory.Build.props.

  --force                    (Default: false) Force operations without
                             confirmation prompts.

  --fix                      (Default: false) Apply automatic fixes for detected
                             issues (use with --analyze).

  --fix-dry-run              (Default: false) Show what --fix would change
                             without modifying files.

  --update                   (Default: false) Check for and install the latest
                             version of CPMigrate.

  --update-packages          (Default: false) Update all packages to latest
                             versions, run tests, rollback on failure.

  --include-prerelease       (Default: false) Include pre-release versions when
                             updating packages.

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
